refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the simplest representation of a geometry collection.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Given a geometry collection, returns the "simplest" representation of the contents.

listitem.para: Homogeneous (uniform) collections are returned as the appropriate multi-geometry.
Heterogeneous (mixed) collections are flattened into a single GeometryCollection.
Collections containing a single atomic element are returned as that element.
Atomic geometries are returned unchanged. If required, these can be converted to a multi-geometry using .

warning.para: This function does not ensure that the result is valid. In particular, a collection containing adjacent or overlapping Polygons will create an invalid MultiPolygon. This situation can be checked with and repaired with .

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Single-element collection converted to an atomic geometry
Nested single-element collection converted to an atomic geometry:
Nested heterogeneous collection flattened to a GeometryCollection:
Collection of Polygons converted to an (invalid) MultiPolygon:
